recap: Added empty-diff guard in callApi that exits 1 with a diagnostic message before making any network call; added test file covering empty diff, missing API key, and non-200 response.
Added test file for commitWithoutHint.getDiff() covering binary-only, text-only, mixed, and yarn.lock-exclusion scenarios; no production code changes.
Fixed commitWithHint.getDiff() to trim joined diff and return binary fallback when empty; added test file covering binary-only (with plan-noise exclusion verified), text-only, and mixed scenarios.
